product_overview: A simple web application for individuals to record, review, and export personal financial transactions with automatic VAT handling and a responsive dark/light theme toggle.
core_goals: Record incomes and expenses quickly with automatic VAT calculation so users keep an accurate ledger.
View and filter transaction history by period and category to understand spending and income patterns.
Export filtered transaction data as CSV or JSON for backup or external analysis.
Provide a comfortable reading experience with a responsive dark/light theme toggle.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users so they can access their personal financial dashboard and manage transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /accounts/login/ -> Fill username -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /accounts/login/ -> Fill username -> Fill incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error message

features.name: Financial Dashboard
features.description: Provide a summarized view of transactions and allow filtering by period and category to focus on relevant records.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See monthly summary and recent transactions
Navigate to / -> Select period filter from dropdown -> Select category filter from dropdown -> Click Filter button -> See filtered transactions and updated summary

features.name: Add Transaction
features.description: Create new financial records with automatic VAT calculation so entries are recorded with correct totals.
user_flows: Navigate to /add/ -> Select transaction type -> Pick date -> Enter title -> Enter price -> Toggle VAT switch -> Submit form -> See new transaction appear on dashboard at /
Navigate to /add/ -> Leave required fields empty or enter invalid price -> Submit form -> See form validation errors and remain on form

features.name: Edit Transaction
features.description: Modify previously entered transactions so users can correct or update records.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a transaction to edit -> Modify form data -> Save changes -> See updated transaction in list on dashboard
Navigate to / -> Select a transaction to edit -> Enter invalid data -> Save changes -> See form validation errors and remain on edit form

features.name: Delete Transaction
features.description: Remove an unwanted financial record from the user's transaction history.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a transaction to delete -> Confirm browser deletion prompt -> See transaction removed from dashboard list
Navigate to / -> Select a transaction to delete -> Cancel deletion prompt -> See transaction remain in dashboard list

features.name: Export Data
features.description: Download the currently filtered dataset as CSV or JSON for offline use.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Export CSV button -> Browser downloads CSV file containing current filters
Navigate to / -> Click Export JSON button -> Browser downloads JSON file containing current filters

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Switch the UI between dark and light themes for comfortable viewing in different lighting conditions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle theme control to switch to dark mode -> See UI switch to dark theme
Navigate to / -> Toggle theme control to switch to light mode -> See UI switch to light theme

features.name: Financial Dashboard
features.description: View summarized logs, filter by month/year and category

features.name: Add Transaction
features.description: Enter new financial records with automatic VAT calculation

features.name: Edit Transaction
user_interactions: Click Edit button on a transaction row

features.name: Delete Transaction
features.description: Remove a financial record from the database
user_interactions: Click Delete button on a transaction row

features.name: Export Data

user_interactions: Click Export CSV or JSON button in dashboard

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle

user_interactions: Click moon/sun icon to toggle dark and light modes
